era_context: Iron Age II. Shalmaneser III is in the later part of his reign (858–824 BCE). The Levant remains under Assyrian control. Greece is in the early Archaic period. Egypt is fragmented.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Most of the Mediterranean world outside Assyrian records
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are documented for this specific year.
historiographic_note: The historical record for 810 BCE is extremely sparse. No specific events are documented in surviving sources. The year falls within the reign of Shalmaneser III, but royal inscriptions do not provide year-by-year detail. The absence of documented events reflects the nature of ancient historical sources, which typically record only major events or provide reign-level summaries rather than annual chronicles.
